form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation fifth of 9 at this track November 2 over 3000m, soft track; 4 len behind Miss Eagle carrying 53.5kg at $26.20. First up last campaign fourth of 9 at Mulheim April 6 over 2400m, 1.5 len behind Almenfee carrying 56.5kg at $7.20. Major upset if she won.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 43-day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by 6 len at Dortmund February 22 over 2500m defeating All My Loving with 58.5kg at $3.50.
